idea_text: AI meeting summary workspace for independent consultants

report.idea_text: AI meeting summary workspace for independent consultants
report.executive_summary: Consultants mention meeting admin pain, but CueIdea found no direct willingness-to-pay or pricing signal. The run should remain research_more.

market_analysis.pain_description: Independent consultants dislike rewriting meeting notes into follow-up tasks.

evidence.title: Meeting notes take too long after calls
evidence.summary: Direct pain: consultants manually turn meeting notes into client follow-up tasks.
evidence.quote: I lose time after every call rewriting notes for clients.

evidence.title: Consultants compare note templates
evidence.summary: Adjacent community signal: consultants share meeting note templates but do not mention paid intent.

competitor_complaints.title: Existing tools are okay but generic
competitor_complaints.summary: Competitor complaint: existing meeting summary tools are generic, but the gap is not tied to paid consultant demand.

direct_competitors.name: MeetingNotesAI
direct_competitors.gap: Generic summaries; no consultant-specific client handoff workflow.

report.ideal_customer_profile: Independent consultants who run many client calls, but buyer urgency is not yet proven.
report.pricing_strategy: Evidence gap: no WTP or pricing evidence was found.
report.positioning: Potentially consultant-specific meeting follow-up, pending paid-intent validation.
report.distribution_strategy: Interview consultants before generating a build verdict.
